name: Bacon Crescent Bites
recipeIngredient: 3 Ounces PHILADELPHIA BRAND Cream Cheese, softened
6 Slices OSCAR MAYER Bacon, crisply cooked, crumbled
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix cream cheese, bacon, onion, and Worcestershire sauce.
2. Separate the crescent rolls into 8 triangles. Cut each triangle in half lengthwise.
3. Spread a generous teaspoon of the cream cheese mixture on each triangle.
4. Roll up each triangle, starting at the shortest side and rolling to the opposite point.
5. Place the rolled-up triangles on an ungreased cookie sheet.
6. Bake at 375°F for 12 to 15 minutes or until golden brown. Serve warm.
